---
name: Slice / task
about: One single-concern unit of work — becomes exactly one small PR
title: "<type>: <slug>"
labels: []
---

## Concern
<!-- The single problem to solve. Parent EPIC: # -->

## Proposed change
<!-- The intended edit. If it spans more than one concern, split it. -->

## Affected files (~1–5)
<!-- Where the change lands. Growing past ~5 files? Split the slice. -->

## Acceptance / how to verify
<!-- What proves it's done: `make ci` PASS, specific behaviour, screenshot. -->

## Risk & open questions
<!-- Anything ambiguous to escalate to the architect before building. -->
